notes: Classic tactical / sniper stock with vertical pistol grip and adjustable cheekpiece. Long-standing duty / police marksman choice.
Tactical stock derived from the M40A3 / Mk13 program. Vertical grip, adjustable cheek and LOP, flat forend for bag riding.
Refined A4 with longer forend, deeper hook butt, and improved bag-rider geometry. Standard PRS / tactical-bolt stock for shooters who prefer fiberglass over chassis.
Lightweight hunting stock with classic sporter lines. Updated 2.0 generation with improved ergonomics and palm swell.
Carbon-and-fiberglass hybrid hunting stock. Ultra-lightweight build (~24 oz typical) for mountain rifles.
Hunting stock with adjustable cheekpiece and LOP for shooters running optics or who need a tunable fit on a hunting rifle.
Sporter-profile carbon-fiber tactical stock. Lightest of the T-series, classic lines, fixed comb.
Tactical hunter profile in carbon. Vertical-ish grip, slightly fuller forend than T1, popular hunting / DMR build.
Carbon-wrapped tactical stock with vertical grip and adjustable cheekpiece. Standard PRS choice for shooters who prefer a traditional stock over chassis.
Heavy tactical stock with wide flat forend, vertical grip, hook butt. Used on the USMC M40A6 / Mk13 Mod 7 program.
Wide-bodied PRS / F-Class stock. Flat-bottom forend, fully adjustable cheek and LOP, designed for bag-supported precision.
Elite Hunter sporter-profile carbon stock. Classic hunting lines with modern ergonomics, lightweight.
Lightweight all-carbon hunting stock. Mountain-rifle weight target with classic sporter geometry.
Drop-in adjustable buttstock for AR / chassis platforms with QD swivels and tool-less adjustable comb / LOP.
Drop-in polymer stock for Remington 700 short-action with M-LOK forend and adjustable LOP / comb spacers. Budget precision option.
Long-action variant of the Hunter 700 platform. Polymer stock with M-LOK and adjustable cheek / LOP.
Polymer chassis-stock hybrid with vertical grip, M-LOK forend, adjustable cheek riser. Budget precision entry into PRS / tactical bolt builds.
Mid-tier folding chassis-stock. Integrated aluminum bedding block, AICS magazine well, adjustable cheek riser and LOP, M-LOK forend.
Tactical fiberglass stock with integral aluminum bedding block. Vertical pistol grip, adjustable cheek. Issued on FBI HRT and police precision rifles.
Updated Pro Series tactical stock with refined ergonomics and full-length aluminum bedding block. Adjustable cheekpiece and LOP spacers.
Mid-priced fiberglass stock with full-length aluminum bedding block. Adjustable cheek / LOP variants available. Common upgrade for factory hunting rifles.
Reproduction of the USMC M40 sniper rifle stock profile in modern fiberglass with aluminum bedding block. Classic tactical lines.
Affordable fiberglass tactical stock styled after the McMillan A5. Vertical grip, adjustable cheek, flat forend. Popular budget PRS / tactical option.
Hunting-profile fiberglass stock. Sporter lines with palm swell and modern shadow-line cheekpiece, lighter than the Renegade.
Lightweight fiberglass mountain-rifle stock. Classic sporter geometry, slimmer profile and lower weight than Outlander.
Fully adjustable PRS / competition fiberglass stock with adjustable cheek, LOP, and butthook. Wide flat forend for bag use.
Custom-grade tactical fiberglass stock with vertical grip and adjustable cheek. Hand-laid solid-fill construction, popular high-end PRS / hunting build.
Heavier PRS / competition variant with wider forend and deeper hook butt. Same hand-laid solid-fill construction as Genesis.
Adjustable wood-laminate thumbhole stock with tool-less LOP and comb adjustment. Drop-in fit for dozens of factory rifle inlets.
Heavy varmint / target wood-laminate stock with wide flat forend. Designed for benchrest and prone varmint shooting.
Lightweight sporter-profile thumbhole stock in wood laminate. Hunting weight with thumbhole ergonomics.
Long-range tactical fiberglass stock with vertical grip, adjustable cheek, and full-length aluminum bedding block. Mid-tier PRS / hunting option.
Carbon-fiber long-range stock with adjustable cheek and aluminum bedding block. Lighter than the M50 with similar geometry.
Custom tactical stock used on Tac Ops Tango series rifles. Vertical grip, adjustable cheek and LOP, hand-laid fiberglass with bedding block.
Signature Tac Ops Tango 51 stock profile. Tactical sniper geometry with vertical grip and adjustable cheek, used on the Tango 51 production rifle.
